languages.text: Генетор Ферренц посвятил годы сотворению и совершенствованию аугментов, способных заменить утраченные руки Вивисектора Мартинакса. К тому моменту, как старания генетора увенчались успехом, Вивисектор уже утратил былую сноровку и остроту ума, а потому был сочтен Ферренцем недостойным получения аугментаций. Бионические руки пережили того, ради кого они сотворялись, и были увековечены в реликварии Сектора Бионика, так и не обретя нового владельца.

Genetor Ferrenz devoted years to creating and perfecting augments capable of replacing Vivisector Martinax's missing arms. By the time the Genetor's efforts bore fruit, the Vivisector had already lost his former dexterity and sharpness of mind, and was consequently deemed unworthy of receiving the augmentations by Ferrenz. The bionic arms outlived the man for whom they had been created, and they were preserved in the Sector Bionica's reliquary, never to be worn.

К тому моменту, как старания генетора увенчались успехом, Вивисектор уже утратил былую сноровку и остроту ума, а потому был сочтен Ферренцем недостойным получения аугментаций. Бионические руки пережили того, ради кого они сотворялись, и были увековечены в реликварии Сектора Бионика, так и не обретя нового владельца.

By the time the Genetor's efforts bore fruit, the Vivisector had already lost his former dexterity and sharpness of mind, and was consequently deemed unworthy of receiving the augmentations by Ferrenz. The bionic arms outlived the man for whom they had been created, and they were preserved in the Sector Bionica's reliquary, never to be worn.

Genetor Ferrenz devoted years to creating and perfecting augments capable of replacing Vivisector Martinax's missing arms. By the time the Genetor's efforts bore fruit, the Vivisector had already lost his former dexterity and sharpness of mind, and was consequently deemed unworthy of receiving the augmentations by Ferrenz. The bionic arms outlived the man for whom they had been created, and they were preserved in the Sector Bionica's reliquary, never to be worn.

Genetor Ferrenz devoted years to creating and perfecting augments capable of replacing Vivisector Martinax's missing arms. By the time the Genetor's efforts bore fruit, the Vivisector had already lost his former dexterity and sharpness of mind, and was consequently deemed unworthy of receiving the augmentations by Ferrenz. The bionic arms outlived the man for whom they had been created, and they were preserved in the Sector Bionica's reliquary, never to be worn.

languages.text: ジェネターのフェレンツは、ヴィヴィセクターのマルティナクスが失った両腕を代替しうる強化器の創造と完成に幾年もを捧げた。ジェネターの努力が実を結ぶころには、ヴィヴィセクターはすでにかつての器用さと明晰な頭脳を失っており、それゆえフェレンツによって強化を受けるに値せぬと判断された。その義腕は、創られた相手たる男よりも長く存続し、セクター・ビオニカの聖遺物庫に保管され、二度と装着されることはなかった。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz devoted years to creating and perfecting augments capable of replacing Vivisector Martinax's missing arms. By the time the Genetor's efforts bore fruit, the Vivisector had already lost his former dexterity and sharpness of mind, and was consequently deemed unworthy of receiving the augmentations by Ferrenz. The bionic arms outlived the man for whom they had been created, and they were preserved in the Sector Bionica's reliquary, never to be worn.

traits.locale_text: セクター・ビオニカの外科医長ジェネト・フェレンツは、パートナーの負傷を治すために、義手を取り戻すために命を懸けた。完璧な補完を求めるあまり、彼は技術の異端となり、破壊された。
ジェネターのフェレンツは、ヴィヴィセクターのマルティナクスが失った両腕を代替しうる強化器の創造と完成に幾年もを捧げた。ジェネターの努力が実を結ぶころには、ヴィヴィセクターはすでにかつての器用さと明晰な頭脳を失っており、それゆえフェレンツによって強化を受けるに値せぬと判断された。その義腕は、創られた相手たる男よりも長く存続し、セクター・ビオニカの聖遺物庫に保管され、二度と装着されることはなかった。

languages.text: 多年来，基因士费伦茨致力于打造和完善能够替代解剖者马丁纳克斯缺失双臂的植入物。当基因士的努力终于取得成果时，解剖者早已失去往日的灵巧技艺与敏锐思维，费伦茨遂判定他已不配接受植入物改造。最终那双仿生手臂比它原定的主人更加长存——它被存放在仿生区的圣物室，从未被佩戴过。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz devoted years to creating and perfecting augments capable of replacing Vivisector Martinax's missing arms. By the time the Genetor's efforts bore fruit, the Vivisector had already lost his former dexterity and sharpness of mind, and was consequently deemed unworthy of receiving the augmentations by Ferrenz. The bionic arms outlived the man for whom they had been created, and they were preserved in the Sector Bionica's reliquary, never to be worn.

traits.locale_text: 多年来，基因士费伦茨致力于打造和完善能够替代解剖者马丁纳克斯缺失双臂的植入物。当基因士的努力终于取得成果时，解剖者早已失去往日的灵巧技艺与敏锐思维，费伦茨遂判定他已不配接受植入物改造。最终那双仿生手臂比它原定的主人更加长存——它被存放在仿生区的圣物室，从未被佩戴过。

languages.text: Le genetor Ferrenz consacra des années à la création et à l'optimisation d'augmentations capables de remplacer les bras manquants du vivisecteur Martinax. Malheureusement, le temps que les efforts du genetor portent leurs fruits, le vivisecteur avait déjà perdu une grande partie de sa dextérité et de sa vivacité d'esprit, et fut considéré comme indigne de bénéficier des augmentations de Ferrenz. Les bras bioniques survécurent donc à celui pour lequel ils avaient été créés ; préservés dans le reliquaire du secteur Bionica, ils ne furent jamais portés.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz devoted years to creating and perfecting augments capable of replacing Vivisector Martinax's missing arms. By the time the Genetor's efforts bore fruit, the Vivisector had already lost his former dexterity and sharpness of mind, and was consequently deemed unworthy of receiving the augmentations by Ferrenz. The bionic arms outlived the man for whom they had been created, and they were preserved in the Sector Bionica's reliquary, never to be worn.

traits.locale_text: Le genetor Ferrenz consacra des années à la création et à l'optimisation d'augmentations capables de remplacer les bras manquants du vivisecteur Martinax. Malheureusement, le temps que les efforts du genetor portent leurs fruits, le vivisecteur avait déjà perdu une grande partie de sa dextérité et de sa vivacité d'esprit, et fut considéré comme indigne de bénéficier des augmentations de Ferrenz. Les bras bioniques survécurent donc à celui pour lequel ils avaient été créés ; préservés dans le reliquaire du secteur Bionica, ils ne furent jamais portés.

Le genetor Ferrenz, nommé responsable des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica, risqua sa vie pour rapporter des implants de bras destinés à remplacer ceux de son partenaire estropié. Dans sa quête obsessionnelle de l'augmentation parfaite, il se laissa séduire par la technohérésie et dut être éliminé.

languages.text: El genetor Ferrenz se pasó años creando y perfeccionando aumentos para sustituir los brazos del vivisector Martinax. Para cuando los esfuerzos del genetor comenzaron a dar frutos, el vivisector ya había perdido su habitual destreza y agudeza mental, y en consecuencia no fue considerado apto para recibir los aumentos de Ferrenz. Los brazos biónicos sobrevivieron al hombre para el cual habían sido creados, y fueron preservados en el relicario del Sector Bionica. Nadie los utilizó jamás.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz devoted years to creating and perfecting augments capable of replacing Vivisector Martinax's missing arms. By the time the Genetor's efforts bore fruit, the Vivisector had already lost his former dexterity and sharpness of mind, and was consequently deemed unworthy of receiving the augmentations by Ferrenz. The bionic arms outlived the man for whom they had been created, and they were preserved in the Sector Bionica's reliquary, never to be worn.

traits.locale_text: El genetor Ferrenz se pasó años creando y perfeccionando aumentos para sustituir los brazos del vivisector Martinax. Para cuando los esfuerzos del genetor comenzaron a dar frutos, el vivisector ya había perdido su habitual destreza y agudeza mental, y en consecuencia no fue considerado apto para recibir los aumentos de Ferrenz. Los brazos biónicos sobrevivieron al hombre para el cual habían sido creados, y fueron preservados en el relicario del Sector Bionica. Nadie los utilizó jamás.

languages.text: Genetör Ferrenz, yıllarını Dirikesimci Martinax'ın eksik kollarının yerini alabilecek ogmentler yaratmaya ve kusursuzlaştırmaya adadı. Genetör'ün çabaları meyve verdiğindeyse Dirikesimci eski el becerisini ve zihin keskinliğini çoktan kaybetmişti, bu nedenle Ferrenz tarafından ogmentasyonları almaya layık görülmedi. Biyonik kollar, kendileri için yaratıldıkları adamdan daha uzun yaşadı ve Sektör Biyonika'nın kutsal emanetler odasında asla takılmamak üzere koruma altına alındı.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz devoted years to creating and perfecting augments capable of replacing Vivisector Martinax's missing arms. By the time the Genetor's efforts bore fruit, the Vivisector had already lost his former dexterity and sharpness of mind, and was consequently deemed unworthy of receiving the augmentations by Ferrenz. The bionic arms outlived the man for whom they had been created, and they were preserved in the Sector Bionica's reliquary, never to be worn.

traits.locale_text: Genetör Ferrenz, yıllarını Dirikesimci Martinax'ın eksik kollarının yerini alabilecek ogmentler yaratmaya ve kusursuzlaştırmaya adadı. Genetör'ün çabaları meyve verdiğindeyse Dirikesimci eski el becerisini ve zihin keskinliğini çoktan kaybetmişti, bu nedenle Ferrenz tarafından ogmentasyonları almaya layık görülmedi. Biyonik kollar, kendileri için yaratıldıkları adamdan daha uzun yaşadı ve Sektör Biyonika'nın kutsal emanetler odasında asla takılmamak üzere koruma altına alındı.

languages.text: Genetor Ferrenz arbeitete viele Jahre lang an der Entwicklung und Perfektionierung von Augmentationen für Vivisektor Martinax' fehlende Arme. Als die Bemühungen des Genetors Früchte trugen, hatte der Vivisektor seine einstige Geschicklichkeit und Geistesschärfe längst verloren und wurde für die von Ferrenz entwickelten Augmentationen als unwürdig erachtet. Die bionischen Arme überlebten den Mann, der sie hätte erhalten sollen, und wurden im Reliquiar des Sektors Bionica aufbewahrt, auf dass sie nie getragen würden.

The bionic arms outlived the man for whom they had been created, and they were preserved in the Sector Bionica's reliquary, never to be worn.
